name: Grilled Italian Shrimp
recipeIngredient: Envelope Good Seasons Italian Salad Dressing Mix
Colavita Extra Virgin Olive Oil, 1/3 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the salad dressing mix, oil, and vinegar in a cruet or small bowl as directed on the envelope.
2. Thread shrimp and salami onto 4 skewers.
3. Place the kabobs on the grill over medium-hot coals. Grill for 3-4 minutes on each side or until the shrimp turn pink.
4. Remove from skewers.
5. Arrange cheese slices on a platter, top with shrimp and salami. Drizzle with dressing mixture and sprinkle with basil. Serve with bread, if desired.
Prep Time: 10 minutes
Grilling time: 8 minutes
